Camps & Events

Train. Compete. Connect.

Year-round camps, tournaments, clinics, and community events for athletes of all ages and skill levels.

Featured

Can't Miss Events

Our marquee events. Early registration is strongly recommended — spots fill fast.

camps Featured

Summer Elite Prospect Camp

Four-day elite camp for serious baseball and softball athletes ages 12-18. Includes Rapsodo and HitTrax assessments, position-specific drills, simulated games, and a recruiting seminar led by former D1 coaches.

July 14 — 17, 2026 9:00 AM — 3:00 PM Ages 12 — 18
Rapsodo & HitTrax data reports Position-specific training College recruiting seminar Camp t-shirt included
$349 8 of 40 remaining Register Now
showcases Featured

Sunday Showcase Series

A premier showcase event where athletes run the 60, take BP, and throw bullpens in front of college scouts. Every athlete receives verified metrics, video, and a player profile to send to college programs.

July 27, 2026 10:00 AM — 4:00 PM Ages 14 — 18
Verified 60-yard dash time Exit velo & throwing velo Professional video package Player profile sent to colleges
$199 12 of 30 remaining Register Now
tournaments Featured

Ballplex Fall Classic Tournament

Three-day tournament at Ballplex and surrounding fields. 8U through 18U divisions. Pool play into single elimination. Champions receive team trophy, rings, and a free month of Ballplex membership.

September 12 — 14, 2026 8:00 AM — 8:00 PM Ages 8U — 18U
8U to 18U divisions Pool play + elimination Championship rings Live-streamed finals
$495/team 4 spots left per division Register Now
clinics Featured

Pitching & Arm Care Clinic

Comprehensive pitching clinic focused on mechanics, velocity development, arm care routines, and pitch design. Uses Rapsodo technology for real-time data on spin rate, velocity, and movement.

August 16, 2026 9:00 AM — 1:00 PM Ages 10 — 18
Rapsodo pitch tracking Arm care & recovery Pitch design session Bullpen with feedback
$89 14 spots available Register Now
showcases Featured

Homeschool All-Star Showcase

Showcase event exclusively for homeschool athletes. Verified metrics, scouting reports, and a Q&A panel with coaches who have experience placing homeschool athletes in college programs.

August 23, 2026 10:00 AM — 3:00 PM Ages 13 — 18
Homeschool-specific recruiting Verified metrics Coach Q&A panel NCAA eligibility guidance
$149 20 spots available Register Now

Browse by Category

Find the Right Event

Camps, tournaments, clinics, showcases, and community events — there's something for everyone.

Camps

Multi-day intensive training camps designed to accelerate player development.

Tournaments

Competitive tournaments for travel teams and local organizations.

Clinics

Focused single-day clinics on specific skills like hitting, pitching, and defense.

Showcases

Showcase events for athletes looking to get recruited by college programs.

Community

Family-friendly events, fundraisers, and open-house celebrations.

Ballplex Fall Classic Tournament

clinics
August 9, 2026 · 9:00 AM — 1:00 PM

Hitting Masterclass Clinic

Half-day hitting intensive covering swing mechanics, approach, and mental game. Athletes will work through stations using HitTrax, tee work, front toss, and live at-bats with instant video feedback.

Ages 9 — 16 4 hours 18 spots available
HitTrax batting simulation Video swing analysis Mental approach session Take-home drill packet
$89 Register
clinics Featured
August 16, 2026 · 9:00 AM — 1:00 PM

Pitching & Arm Care Clinic

Comprehensive pitching clinic focused on mechanics, velocity development, arm care routines, and pitch design. Uses Rapsodo technology for real-time data on spin rate, velocity, and movement.

Ages 10 — 18 4 hours 14 spots available
Rapsodo pitch tracking Arm care & recovery Pitch design session Bullpen with feedback
$89 Register
community
Every Friday · 6:00 PM — 9:00 PM

Friday Night Lights: Open Play

Every Friday night we open the facility for supervised open play. Cages, HitTrax, and turf area available. Music, snacks, and a relaxed environment. Members free, drop-ins welcome.

Ages All ages 3 hours No limit
All cages open HitTrax challenges Music & snacks Members free
$15 drop-in Register
showcases Featured
August 23, 2026 · 10:00 AM — 3:00 PM

Homeschool All-Star Showcase

Showcase event exclusively for homeschool athletes. Verified metrics, scouting reports, and a Q&A panel with coaches who have experience placing homeschool athletes in college programs.

Ages 13 — 18 1 day 20 spots available
Homeschool-specific recruiting Verified metrics Coach Q&A panel NCAA eligibility guidance
$149 Register
camps
August 2 — 3, 2026 · 9:00 AM — 12:00 PM

Youth Fundamentals Camp

Two-day camp for young athletes learning the game. Covers throwing, catching, hitting, and base running fundamentals in a fun, encouraging environment. Games and competitions each day.

Ages 6 — 10 2 days 10 spots available
Fun games & competitions Fundamentals focus Camp t-shirt included Parent resources packet
$129 Register
clinics
September 6, 2026 · 9:00 AM — 4:00 PM

Coaches Development Seminar

Full-day seminar for youth, travel, and high school coaches. Sessions on practice planning, using tech (Rapsodo/HitTrax), player development strategies, drills library, and building a program culture.

Ages Coaches 1 day 25 spots available
Tech integration training Practice plan templates Drill library access CEU certificate
$99 Register
community
August 30, 2026 · 5:00 PM — 9:00 PM

Ballplex Family Night & BBQ

End-of-summer celebration for all Ballplex families. Free BBQ, wiffle ball tournament, HitTrax home run derby, face painting for kids, and facility tours for new families. Open to the public.

Ages All ages 4 hours No limit
Free BBQ & drinks Wiffle ball tournament Home run derby Facility tours
Free Register

Why Attend

The Ballplex Difference

Our events are more than just games — they're opportunities to grow, get seen, and get better.

Pro-Level Tech

HitTrax and Rapsodo at every camp and clinic. Real data, real results, real development.

Expert Coaching

Every event is staffed by former pros, D1 players, and certified coaches who care about development.

Recruiting Exposure

Showcases with verified metrics and video packages sent directly to college programs.

Community

Our family events and open play nights create a welcoming environment where everyone belongs.

Ready to Take Your Game
to the Next Level?

Join the most complete baseball and softball development center in Brevard County. Everything you need — coaching, technology, training, and community — all under one roof.

Get Started Today Contact Us

Elite Baseball & Softball Player Development in Viera, Florida. Private Lessons, Homeschool Program, Strength & Conditioning and Cage Rentals.
